unsustainable-2026.title: Is the Budget "Unsustainable"?
unsustainable-2026.subtitle: The town's own record says the opposite
unsustainable-2026.description: Andover's First Selectman calls the school budget "unsustainable" and urges a NO vote on June 16. The town's own numbers say the opposite. Here are the facts.

jeff-misleading-2026.title: Jeff is Misleading Us
jeff-misleading-2026.subtitle: On the May 26, 2026 AES budget mailer
jeff-misleading-2026.description: Andover First Selectman Jeff Maguire mailed an anti-budget flyer to residents urging a NO vote on the May 26, 2026 AES budget referendum. A claim-by-claim walkthrough of what the mailer says against what the public record actually shows, with the mailer reproduced page-by-page alongside the corrections.

who-decides-schools-2026.title: Who Decides How the Schools Are Run
who-decides-schools-2026.description: Explaining the legal relationship between the Boards of Education and Finance: who does what?
